<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>Penalize incorrect bond linkages or missing hydrogens once only in 8 (a) and 8 (c) (i).</em></p>
<p><strong><em>[1 mark]</em></strong></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>«pH = 9.87 + log<span class="mjpage"><math alttext="\left( {\frac{{0.500}}{{0.700}}} \right)" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
<mrow>
<mo>(</mo>
<mrow>
<mfrac>
<mrow>
<mn>0.500</mn>
</mrow>
<mrow>
<mn>0.700</mn>
</mrow>
</mfrac>

</math></span>»</p>
<p>«= 9.87 – 0.146»</p>
<p>= 9.72</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>pH can be deduced by an alternative method.</em></p>
<p><strong><em>[1 mark]</em></strong></p>
